cgm.subtitle: Sprint 40: optional Nightscout integration. Display only — no medical decisions.

pause.button.label: Take a break
pause.saved.desc: Come back when you're ready. Streak won't break, your session will continue from where you left off.
session.warning.20min.desc: Don't forget to take breaks. You can rest, drink water, or have a snack. Your session will be saved.
session.warning.40min.desc: Your brain gets tired after 40 minutes. Drink water, stretch, or step outside for fresh air. Streak won't break.
session.warning.60min: You've been studying for over an hour ({minutes} min)
session.warning.60min.desc: Seriously, take a break. You learn better after rest. Streak won't break, and you'll save your energy.
